vota 0.1.0
  • Índice

    • The VOTA Methodology
    • Metodología VOTA
    • Primeros pasos con vota
    • Tutorial paso a paso
    • Step-by-step Tutorial

Naming Standardization Plan for vota Package

🎯 Strategy: Code and documentation to English, vignettes stay in Spanish

Phase 1: Function Documentation (roxygen2)

Phase 2: Error Messages and Comments

Phase 3: Function Parameters (keep current Spanish names for backward compatibility)

  • Keep: factor_correccion_abstencion, factor_correccion_jovenes, factor_correccion_otbl
  • Keep: tiempo_entre_elecciones, codigo_provincia
  • Keep: votos_ant, mt_simplificada
  • Rationale: These are domain-specific terms, changing would break existing code

Phase 4: Internal Variable Names

  • Change Spanish comments to English
  • Keep Spanish variable names that are domain-specific
  • Update generic variable names to English

Phase 5: Consistent Naming Patterns

  • Functions: snake_case (already mostly consistent)
  • Variables: snake_case (already mostly consistent)
  • Columns: Spanish domain terms (codigo_provincia, votos_ant, etc.)
  • Comments: English
  • Documentation: English
  • Error messages: English

Translation Dictionary for Documentation:

Spanish -> English: - “Ejecutar/ejecuta” -> “Run/runs” - “Simulacion” -> “Simulation” - “Electoral” -> “Electoral” - “Completa” -> “Complete” - “Funcion” -> “Function” - “Algoritmo” -> “Algorithm” - “Principal” -> “Main” - “Aplica” -> “Applies” - “Proyeccion” -> “Projection” - “Correccion” -> “Correction” - “Abstencion” -> “Abstention” - “Nuevos votantes” -> “New voters” - “Redistribucion” -> “Redistribution” - “Indecisos” -> “Undecided” - “Implementacion” -> “Implementation” - “Optimizada” -> “Optimized” - “Metodo” -> “Method” - “Asignacion” -> “Allocation” - “Escanos” -> “Seats” - “Provincia” -> “Province” - “Partido” -> “Party” - “Votos” -> “Votes” - “Numero” -> “Number” - “Calculo” -> “Calculation” - “Analisis” -> “Analysis” - “Sensibilidad” -> “Sensitivity” - “Permite” -> “Allows” - “Procesar” -> “Process” - “Eficientemente” -> “Efficiently” - “Estandar” -> “Standard” - “Usado” -> “Used” - “Incluye” -> “Includes” - “Entrada” -> “Input” - “Salida” -> “Output” - “Archivo” -> “File” - “Directorio” -> “Directory” - “Guardar” -> “Save” - “Resultados” -> “Results” - “Datos” -> “Data” - “Tipos” -> “Types” - “Estrategia” -> “Strategy” - “Parametro” -> “Parameter” - “Controlar” -> “Control” - “Nivel” -> “Level” - “Variabilidad” -> “Variability” - “Patrones” -> “Patterns” - “Necesario” -> “Needed” - “Minimo” -> “Minimum” - “Umbral” -> “Threshold” - “Semilla” -> “Seed” - “Reproducibilidad” -> “Reproducibility” - “Argumentos” -> “Arguments” - “Adicionales” -> “Additional” - “Mostrar” -> “Show” - “Mensajes” -> “Messages” - “Progreso” -> “Progress” - “Lista” -> “List” - “Incluyendo” -> “Including” - “Estimacion” -> “Estimation/Estimate” - “Nacional” -> “National” - “Provincial” -> “Provincial” - “Asignados” -> “Assigned” - “Simulaciones” -> “Simulations” - “Matrices” -> “Matrices” - “Transferencia” -> “Transfer” - “Participacion” -> “Turnout” - “Porcentaje” -> “Percentage” - “Estimado” -> “Estimated” - “Metadatos” -> “Metadata” - “Ejecucion” -> “Execution” - “Pasos” -> “Steps” - “Validacion” -> “Validation” - “Generacion” -> “Generation” - “Aplicacion” -> “Application” - “Usando” -> “Using” - “Historicos” -> “Historical” - “Mediante” -> “Using/Through” - “Basica” -> “Basic” - “Personalizada” -> “Custom” - “Produccion” -> “Production” - “Ejemplo” -> “Example”

Status Tracking:

  • ✅ README.md documentation - COMPLETED
  • ✅ Vignettes enhancement - COMPLETED (staying in Spanish)
  • 🔄 Function documentation standardization - IN PROGRESS
  • ⏳ Error messages standardization - PENDING
  • ⏳ Internal comments standardization - PENDING
  • ⏳ Testing and validation - PENDING

Notes:

  • Keep vignettes in Spanish as requested
  • Maintain backward compatibility for function parameters
  • Focus on making the package internationally accessible
  • Domain-specific terms can remain in Spanish where appropriate
  • Prioritize consistency over literal translation
